title: carex magellanica subsp. planitiei
intro: Carex magellanica subsp. planitiei, also known as Magellan sedge, is a subspecies of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that have been traditionally used to treat wounds and infections. The health benefits of Carex magellanica subsp. planitiei include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which have been used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
